summary: Iteration 42 - Comprehensive testing of Rapid Review rubric grading modal, Crew QR History tab, crew leader member link, Tim's crew configuration, and data cleanup verification. Backend: 16/16 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All major features verified working. Fixed crewInfo->crewLink bug in CrewCapturePage.

minor.issue: Queue items don't include photo_count field in response (data exists in DB but not projected)
Main production rubrics missing 'no_image_captured' and 'improper_image_quality' in hard_fail_conditions (only test rubrics have them)

action_items: Add 'no_image_captured' and 'improper_image_quality' to hard_fail_conditions in all main rubric definitions (bed edging, drainage/trenching, etc.)
Consider adding photo_count to rapid review queue projection for UI display
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: CrewCapturePage.jsx line 358 referenced undefined 'crewInfo' variable - changed to 'crewLink'
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data. Verified 3 Longvue HOA submissions with real photos for Fran's Crew.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 42 verified: 1) Rapid Review displays real uploaded photos from Longvue HOA drainage work. 2) Rapid Review rubric toggle shows when rubric categories exist. 3) Rapid Review FAIL modal shows rubric category buttons that add [FAIL] lines, fail indicator chips, and hard fail condition chips. 4) Rapid Review EXEMPLARY modal shows rubric category buttons with score selectors (1-5) that highlight selected value. 5) Comment textarea is scrollable with grading on separate lines. 6) Crew QR app has 4 tabs (Capture, History, Standards, Equipment). 7) History tab shows submission history with job names, scores, status. 8) GET /api/public/crew-submissions/{code} returns submission history (3 for Fran's crew). 9) Tim's crew (6ef4489a) properly configured as Maintenance crew leader. 10) Fran's Crew has 3 real submissions with 5 uploaded photos. 11) Overview, Client Report, and Settings pages load correctly. NOTE: Main rubrics don't have no_image_captured/improper_image_quality in hard_fail_conditions yet.

verified_features.rapid_review_real_photos: Longvue HOA drainage photos display correctly
verified_features.rapid_review_rubric_toggle: Rubric toggle button shows when categories exist
verified_features.rapid_review_rubric_panel: Panel shows 3 categories with names, weights, fail/exemplary indicators
verified_features.rapid_review_fail_modal_rubric_buttons: 3 rubric category buttons add [FAIL] lines to comment
verified_features.rapid_review_fail_modal_chips: Fail indicator chips and hard fail condition chips visible
verified_features.rapid_review_exemplary_modal_score_selec: Score selectors (1-5) appear after clicking rubric button
verified_features.rapid_review_score_highlight: Selected score value highlights with cyan background
verified_features.rapid_review_comment_scrollable: Textarea is scrollable with grading entries on separate lines
verified_features.crew_qr_4_tabs: Capture, History, Standards, Equipment tabs all present
verified_features.crew_qr_history_tab: Shows 3 Longvue HOA submissions with job names, status, photo counts
verified_features.tim_crew_configured: Tim's Crew (6ef4489a) shows Maintenance division, TR-20 truck
verified_features.overview_page_loads: Overview page loads with submissions, metrics, rapid review QR
verified_features.client_report_functional: Client Report shows Longvue HOA entries, timeframe buttons, Export PDF
verified_features.settings_compact_cards: 8 theme cards, 4 font cards in compact grid layout

bug_fixed.fix: Changed to 'crewLink' which is the correct state variable
